use_cases: Display loading states during async operations like API calls or data fetching.
Show progress feedback during form submissions or file uploads.
Indicate page transitions or navigation loading in single-page applications.
Provide visual feedback while waiting for content to load in dashboards or data tables.
Use as a minimal loading indicator in button components or inline with text.
ai_summary: A minimalist loading dots component that displays three animated dots with staggered timing to indicate ongoing processes. Accepts customizable size and optional text content displayed before the dots. Uses a looping CSS animation for the dots and renders as an inline-flex element that integrates seamlessly with text or buttons.
